page_subtitle: Drop a file and extract text in seconds.
onboarding_dropzone: Drop images, PDFs, or Word documents here
onboarding_hint: Supports PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, TIFF, multi-page PDFs, Word (DOC/DOCX/DOT/DOTX), and PowerPoint (PPT/PPTX).
preview_drop_hint: Drag a file into the browser window and release to replace.
preview_word_pending: Office document preview appears after OCR.
preview_office_pending: Office document preview appears after OCR.
preview_tiff_unsupported: TIFF preview is not reliably supported in this browser. OCR still runs.
preview_failed: Preview for "{name}" could not be loaded.
custom_prompt_placeholder: Describe this image in one paragraph.
custom_prompt_hint: When set, overrides the selected task preset.
backend_hint: Dev uses layout detection with region OCR via the vision LLM; Direct uses the legacy path.
expert_layout_hint: Overrides layout per request (Dev mode only).
expert_layout_model_hint: Layout model for Dev mode. Supports Hugging Face object-detection models.
expert_layout_threshold_hint: Confidence threshold for layout (0–1). Lower finds more regions; higher filters uncertain ones.
expert_table_transformer_hint: Uses Microsoft Table Transformer for precise table cell boxes (Dev mode only).
expert_per_region_ocr_hint: Runs OCR per layout region and aligns with page OCR. Off saves time but drops per-region text.
expert_text_anchor_hint: Fuzzy-match region OCR to page OCR. Off keeps raw region text (helps some tables).
expert_text_anchor_threshold_hint: Minimum fuzzy score (0–100) to adopt the anchor. Below that, raw region text is used. Default: {default}.
expert_word_detector_hint: Optional word detector for word boxes (PaddleOCR or DocTR, Dev mode only).
expert_compare_include_detector_only_hin: Off (default): compare uses raw OCR tokens only. On: adds DocTR boxes without a raw token (may duplicate).
inference_provider_hint: Vision LLM backend for OCR (e.g. Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp).
gif_frames_hint: Animated GIFs only. Higher = more coverage, slower.
meta_pick_file: Choose a file to start OCR.
diff_empty: Pick an engine below, optionally enter reference text, then click Compare.
compare_reference_hint: Provide ground-truth text to compute standard CER/WER, layout-relaxed R-CER/R-WER, and token F1. For digital PDFs the embedded text layer is used automatically — check ignore if unreadable. Values appear under Metrics.
compare_reference_placeholder: Paste reference text or upload a .txt file…
metrics_empty: Values appear after a compare run or when reference text is set.
global_drop: Drop a file to start OCR
diff_token_no_coords: No coordinates — token only appears in page text.
token_limit_invalid: Token limit must be a positive integer.
gif_frames_invalid: GIF frames must be a positive integer.
peer_models_unreachable: Peer model list unreachable — enter model name manually.
metrics_no_reference: No reference text provided. Paste or upload under Reference text above.
metrics_tooltip_avg_confidence: Average per-word confidence when the engine provides it. Not comparable across engines (different calibration).
metrics_tooltip_sym_char: Normalized Levenshtein distance on characters (0 = identical, 1 = completely different). Not CER — both sides are hypotheses.
metrics_tooltip_sym_word: Normalized Levenshtein distance on words. Not WER — both sides are hypotheses.
metrics_tooltip_precision: Share of our tokens that the other engine also returns (anti-hallucination).
metrics_tooltip_recall: Share of the other engine's tokens that we also produce (coverage).
metrics_tooltip_cer: Standard Character Error Rate: Levenshtein(reference, hypothesis) / |reference characters|. Order-sensitive; lower is better.
metrics_tooltip_wer: Standard Word Error Rate: Levenshtein on words / |reference words|. Order-sensitive; lower is better.
metrics_tooltip_relaxed_cer: Layout-relaxed CER: splits text into blocks, matches blocks by content, then computes character edit distance. Not standard CER; moved blocks are not penalized as delete+insert.
metrics_tooltip_relaxed_wer: Layout-relaxed WER: splits text into blocks, matches blocks by content, then computes word edit distance. Not standard WER; moved blocks are not penalized as delete+insert.
metrics_tooltip_f1: Token-level F1 between hypothesis and reference.
models_vision_hint: {count} vision model(s) ({provider}). Use provider/model when qualified.
models_vision_empty: No models loaded from {provider} — enter names manually.
layout_region_preview_angle_title: Tilt on deskewed page preview (original − page correction)
layout_region_deskew_correction_title: CCW correction applied to the region crop for OCR
warning_document_layout: Document layout: {regions} regions detected on {pages} page(s).
bench_subtitle: N files × M runners. CER/WER score ordered text; R-CER/R-WER tolerate moved blocks; F1 shows token overlap.
bench_token_f1_title: Order-free token overlap against the reference. Lower penalty for moved text than CER/WER.
bench_diff_moved_title: Present in both texts, but at a different position. CER/WER still penalize order changes.
bench_drop_hint: Drop images, PDFs, Word, or ZIP files here or
bench_models_none: No vision models found in Ollama.
bench_pick_runner: Select at least one model or engine.
